prerequisites: A Mercado Libre / Mercado Ads seller account with access to the advertising (Product Ads) features you want to report on.
A registered application in the Mercado Libre Developer Center (https://developers.mercadolibre.com.ar/devcenter), which provides the App ID (client_id) and Secret Key (client_secret).
A redirect URI configured on the application and the 'offline_access' scope enabled so the OAuth authorization can return a refresh token.
A client_refresh_token obtained by completing the OAuth 2.0 authorization-code flow for the account, used to mint short-lived access tokens.
A value for lookback_days (required) defining how many days of data to re-fetch on each sync; optionally start_date and end_date to bound the reporting window.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 (refresh token)
authMethods.summary: Mercado Ads uses Mercado Libre's OAuth 2.0. Provide the application's client_id and client_secret plus a client_refresh_token. The connector exchanges the refresh token at the token endpoint (https://api.mercadolibre.com/oauth/token) using grant_type=refresh_token to obtain short-lived access tokens for API calls. The refresh token is issued when the 'offline_access' scope is granted during the authorization-code flow.

setupSteps.title: Create an application in the Developer Center
setupSteps.body: Sign in with your Mercado Libre seller account at the Developer Center (https://developers.mercadolibre.com.ar/devcenter) and create an app. After creation, the app dashboard shows the App ID (client_id) and Secret Key (client_secret).

setupSteps.title: Configure redirect URI and offline access
setupSteps.body: On the application, set a Redirect URI and enable the read and 'offline_access' scopes. The offline_access scope is what allows the authorization to return a refresh token rather than only a short-lived access token.

setupSteps.title: Authorize and obtain a refresh token
setupSteps.body: Run the OAuth 2.0 authorization-code flow for the account: send the user to the authorization URL, then exchange the returned code at https://api.mercadolibre.com/oauth/token (grant_type=authorization_code) along with client_id, client_secret, and the redirect_uri. The token response includes the refresh_token to use as client_refresh_token.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter client_id, client_secret, and client_refresh_token in the connector. The connector refreshes access tokens automatically at https://api.mercadolibre.com/oauth/token using grant_type=refresh_token.

setupSteps.title: Set the reporting window
setupSteps.body: Set lookback_days (required) to control how many days of recent data are re-synced each run. Optionally set start_date and end_date to bound the period of data the connector pulls.
